overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city environment from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The clip begins with observing traffic on a multi-lane street beneath an overpass, transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway lined with neon signs and storefronts, and exits to a busy intersection featuring large commercial billboards.

events.description: blue sports car and gray SUV pass by in quick succession

agents.ego_description: standing at street level observing the flow of traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving past the camera position

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with purple background and character illustration
elevated highway structure crossing above the street
metal railings separating pedestrian area from road

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a busy cyberpunk city street with vehicles flowing beneath an elevated overpass. A prominent purple billboard towers on the right side while various cars including a blue sports car pass by. The camera remains stationary, observing the moderate traffic from the sidewalk.

events.description: camera moves from open street into covered pedestrian walkway beneath the overpass
entering deeper into the covered area with increased neon lighting visibility

agents.ego_description: turning right from the street and walking into the covered pedestrian arcade

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown outfit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: metal and concrete overhead structure of the walkway
pedestrian traffic light showing walk signal
paved pedestrian path under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and enters a covered pedestrian walkway, transitioning from the bright open street to a sheltered corridor beneath the overpass. The lighting shifts to artificial neon tones as the camera approaches pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with shops and neon signage

events.description: passing by distinctive pink-leaved trees planted along the walkway
approaching the exit of the covered walkway with view opening to street ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor passing various pedestrians and storefront displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: decorative trees with pink foliage planted in concrete planters
illuminated automated vendor against the wall
garbage bags piled against the left wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered pedestrian arcade, the camera passes neon signs, digital billboards, and distinctive pink-leaved trees. Various pedestrians walk in both directions along the concrete path. Trash bags and vending machines line the walls as the camera approaches the walkway exit.

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into open urban intersection
black limousine and orange sports car passing through the intersection

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered area and continuing along the city sidewalk past large commercial signs

notable_agents.action: black limousine driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large neon sign with pink lettering and graphic of a head
elevated walkway crossing above the street with glass enclosure
yellow and green escalator leading up to the pedestrian bridge
tall modern building with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bright urban intersection dominated by a massive 'BRAIN SHACK' neon sign. A pedestrian overpass with escalators spans the street while vehicles including a black limousine and orange sports car navigate the intersection. The camera continues along the sidewalk past modern glass towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that moves from a wide city street into a sheltered neon corridor before emerging into a bright, commercial intersection. It begins on a sidewalk observing traffic and a towering purple billboard beneath an elevated overpass, before the camera turns right to enter a covered pedestrian walkway. As the environment shifts from open daylight to artificial neon tones, the camera glides past digital signs, vending machines, and pink-leaved trees while navigating through a crowd of pedestrians. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the arcade, transitioning back into the bright urban light of a busy intersection dominated by a massive Brain Shack sign and a pedestrian overpass. Finally, the movement continues along the sidewalk, passing a black limousine and orange sports car beneath the shadow of modern glass towers.
